text.title: Creative Brief Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to produce a validated, owner-signed creative brief.

step.name: assemble-inputs
step.input: ICP doc + past campaign exports + case studies + brand voice doc
step.action: Pin each input into the agent's context with explicit path / URL. Refuse to draft if any input is missing.
step.decision-gate: If audience or proof source is missing, STOP and request the artefact.

step.name: fill-template
step.action: Fill every required field. Each field's `source` cites the input it came from. Do not paraphrase generic SaaS copy.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-creative-brief-template.py` against the JSON form. Fix every violation before owner review.
step.decision-gate: If validator returns non-zero, return to step 2.

step.name: owner-sign-off
step.action: Surface "ready for owner review" flag. Owner stamps with handle + date. Updates last_reviewed.

step.name: publish-and-link
step.action: Commit to brief store with brief_id. Link from the campaign ticket. Update prior brief's `superseded_by` if applicable.
step.output: brief live; designer + media buyer can act on it.
